general.title: Strandsatt i Mellanöstern? Vänd dig hit för hjälp
general.summary:
Runt 20 000 svenskar bedöms bo runt Persiska viken och flera tusen befinner sig i regionen tillfälligt – utan att kunna ta sig hem på grund av Irankriget.

Det här ska du tänka på om du är en av de strandsatta.

general.title: 'Every day feels like a month': Iranians describe life under US-Israeli strikes
general.summary: Iranians are coping with daily strikes, internet blackouts, and security crackdowns - all while trying to stay in touch with loved ones.

general.title: Ayatollans son kliver fram ur skuggorna
general.summary: Den dödade ayatollans son pekas ut som Irans nya ledare. Enligt regimkritiska tv-kanalen Iran International är Mojtaba Khamenei Revolutionsgardets favoritkandidat att ta över. ”Han har inte gjort sig känd för att vara reformvänlig”, säger Mellanösternexperten Mohammad Fazlhashemi.

general.title: ”Kina stärks – utan att de behöver göra något”
general.summary: Konflikten i Mellanöstern ser ut att gynna president Xi i Kina. Landet kan stärka sin maktposition i Asien och samtidigt framstå som det det globala syds enda vän. ”Kriget försvagar ytterligare USA:s ställning”, säger UI:s Björn Jerdén.

general.title: Middle East crisis live: Israel launches fresh strikes on Tehran; Iran claims to have targeted Kurdish groups in Iraq
general.summary:
Tehran says it hit groups ‘opposed to the revolution’, amid reports the US is looking to arm Kurdish militias

  • Tell us: how have you been affected by the latest events in the Middle East?

Iran says it has targeted Kurdish groups in Iraq and warned “separatist groups” against action in the widening war.

Tehran said on Thursday it had hit Iraq-based Kurdish groups “opposed to the revolution”, as reports said the US was looking to arm Kurdish militias to infiltrate Iran.

We will not tolerate them in any way.

general.title: Investor fortsätter öka i EQT
general.summary: Wallenbergssfärens investmentbolag Investor har köpt runt 400.000 aktier i EQT och fortsätter därmed att öka i riskkapitalbolaget.

general.title: Airstrikes hit Iran-Iraq border as US and Israeli plan to mobilise Kurds gathers pace
general.summary:
Experts say backing Iran’s ethnic communities could ‘open up a hornet’s nest’ and increase risk of chaotic civil war

Intense waves of airstrikes have hit dozens of military positions, frontier posts and police stations along northern parts of Iran’s border with Iraq in what appears to be preparation by US and Israel for a new front in their war.

A US official with knowledge of the discussions between Washington and Kurdish officials said the US was ready to provide air support if Kurdish fighters crossed the border from northern Iraq.

Continue reading...

general.title: Vill inte chartra plan: ”Förenat med risker”
general.summary: Tusentals svenskar är strandsatta i Mellanöstern. Regeringen undersöker flera möjligheter att få hem dem, men i nuläget vill man inte chartra plan. ”Det är förenat med risker att transportera medborgare längre sträckor”, säger utrikesministern.

general.title: DN:s Kerstin Gezelius får pris av Aftonbladet: ”Väldigt kul att kritiker uppmärksammas”
general.summary: DN:s filmkritiker Kerstin Gezelius är årets mottagare av Aftonbladets Axel Liffner-stipendium. ”Med sitt kritiska allvar, sin humor och osvikliga stilkänsla är hon en ledstjärna inom filmkritiken”, står det bland annat i motiveringen.

general.title: Spain rejects White House comments that it now backs US-Israel war on Iran – Europe live
general.summary:
The White House press secretary earlier said Spain had agreed to ‘cooperate with the US military’ after Donald Trump threatened to cut trade to Spain

Meanwhile, France has allowed US aircraft on some of its bases in the Middle East during the conflict opposing the United States and Israel with Iran, the French military said.

“As part of our relations with the United States, the presence of their aircraft has been temporarily authorised on our bases” in the region, a spokeswoman for the military general staff told AFP.

“These aircraft contribute to the protection of our partners in the Gulf.”

“The frigate Cristóbal Colón joined the Charles de Gaulle Naval Group on 3 March to carry out escort, protection, and advanced training duties in the Baltic Sea. The group will now head to the Mediterranean, arriving off the coast of Crete around 10 March.

The supply ship Cantabria will also briefly put to sea to provide fuel and logistical support during the Naval Group’s transit through the Gulf of Cádiz.

Continue reading...
quotes: As part of our relations with the United States, <strong>the presence of their aircraft has been temporarily authorised on our bases
These aircraft contribute to the protection of our partners in the Gulf.

general.title: First North-bolaget slutar med bitcoin – aktien rusar
general.summary: First North-listade Refine Group lägger ned sin satsning på att äga bitcoin – efter knappt åtta månader och en förlust på 25 procent.  Syftet är enligt bolaget att renodla verksamheten till att satsa på digital försäljning till konsumenter.  Aktien lyfter över 100 procent på beskedet.

general.title: Cabinet ministers said to have opposed US use of British bases for military operation against Iran – UK politics live
general.summary:
A number of ministers voiced their strong opposition to Donald Trump using British airbases to attack Iran’s missile capability, according to a report

Home secretary Shabana Mahmood is due to give a speech later this morning as she looks to make the case for a “firm but fair asylum system”.

Up to 21,000 asylum seekers who have waited for a year for their claims to be processed could be allowed to enter the jobs market so they can support themselves, the Home Office has said, as part of a package of measures to be announced.

Continue reading...

general.title: Detaljhandeln i EMU sjönk i januari
general.summary: Försäljningsvolymen i detaljhandeln i euroområdet sjönk 0,1 procent i januari, säsongsjusterat, jämfört med föregående månad. Jämfört med motsvarande månad föregående år ökade försäljningen 2,0 procent.

general.title: Nvidia uppges stoppa tillverkning av Kina-chip
general.summary: Enligt personer med insyn har Nvidia omfördelat tillverkningskapaciteten hos kontraktstillverkaren TSMC till sin senaste chipmodell Vera-Rubin istället för H200-chipen avsedda för Kina. Det rapporterar Financial Times.

general.title: Delayed UK rescue flight due to leave Middle East on Thursday, says minister
general.summary:
Government-chartered plane was held up in Oman overnight for ‘operational reasons’, according to Alex Norris

  • UK politics live – latest updates

  • Middle East crisis – live updates

The first government rescue flight from the Middle East failed to take off because of problems “getting passengers on board”, a minister has said.

Technical issues meant the flight did not depart on Wednesday night from the Omani capital Muscat.

Continue reading...

general.title: Använd spelskatten för att skydda unga
general.summary: Allt fler minderåriga spelar om pengar. Spellagstiftningen är inte problemet: licensierade spelbolag tar redan ansvar, men det räcker inte när minderåriga exponeras för spel om pengar både i datorspel och på olicensierade spelplattformar, skriver Philip Lagström från FDJ UNITED.

general.title: Tankrederiet fortsätter undvika Hormuzsundet: ”Riskbilden allvarlig”
general.summary: Uppgifterna från Iran om att Hormuzsundet inte skulle vara stängt fick oljepriset att falla på torsdagsmorgonen, åtminstone temporärt. Samtidigt finns uppgifter om attacker mot fartyg i regionen. ”Riskbilden är fortsatt allvarlig och komplex”, säger Stena Bulks vd Erik Hånell, som tror att säkerhetsläget behöver förbättras väsentligt för att rederier ska återgå till normal trafik.

general.title: Marika Carlsson är ett smittsamt fnissigt hormonmonster – mest för klimakteriekvinnor
general.summary: Marika Carlsson bär mjukglansig kostym och presenterar sig som klimakteriedoula i sin nya ståuppturné. Publiken består till 98 procent av kvinnor mellan 50 till 70 år och vrålar som en konsertpublik, skriver Josefin Olevik.

general.title: Husband of Labour MP released on bail after arrest on suspicion of spying for China
general.summary:
David Taylor and two other men arrested on Wednesday have been freed on bail until May, Met police say

The husband of a Labour MP and two other men have been released on bail after being arrested on suspicion of spying for China.

David Taylor, who is married to the Scottish Labour MP Joani Reid, is accused of assisting a foreign intelligence service.

Continue reading...

general.title: Oljepriset vänder skarpt ned – börsen lyfter
general.summary: Under torsdagsförmiddagen vänder oljepriset skarpt ned. Stockholmsbörsen vänder lika tydligt upp från morgonens initiala nedgång. En tweet kan ha utlöst marknadsrörelserna.

tech.title: Online harassment is entering its AI era
tech.summary: Scott Shambaugh didn’t think twice when he denied an AI agent’s request to contribute to matplotlib, a software library that he helps manage. Like many open-source projects, matplotlib has been overwhelmed by a glut of AI code contributions, and so Shambaugh and his fellow maintainers have instituted a policy that all AI-written code must be…

tech.title: TerraPower gets OK to start construction of its first nuclear plant
tech.summary: Plant won't be done until 2030 at the earliest, and it still needs an operating license.

tech.title: Space Command chief throws cold water on the question of UAPs in space
tech.summary: "I am not aware of anything that is extraterrestrial, other than comets and things like that."
quotes: I am not aware of anything that is extraterrestrial, other than comets and things like that.

tech.title: Large genome model: Open source AI trained on trillions of bases
tech.summary: System can identify genes, regulatory sequences, splice sites, and more.

tech.title: Google and Epic announce settlement to end app store antitrust case
tech.summary: The era of the 30 percent app store cut has ended.

tech.title: Lawsuit: Google Gemini sent man on violent missions, set suicide "countdown"
tech.summary: Gemini allegedly called man its "husband," said they could be together in death.

tech.title: After a rocky six years, Sony cancels future single-player PC game releases
tech.summary: Titles like Ghost of Yotei will remain exclusive to Sony's hardware.

tech.title: Re-creating the complex cuisine of prehistoric Europeans
tech.summary: SEM analysis of pottery residues showed people combined fish with a wide variety of plants when cooking.

tech.summary: "Our bill authorizes critical funding for, and gives strategic direction to, the agency."
quotes: Our bill authorizes critical funding for, and gives strategic direction to, the agency.

tech.summary: The Neo won't be for everyone, but Apple has managed to preserve a premium feel.

tech.summary: Data center operators to sign pledge to supply their own power instead of relying on grid.

tech.summary: Cute, colorful laptop takes the place of the old $599 M1 MacBook Air.

tech.summary: The transformational potential of AI is already well established. Enterprise use cases are building momentum and organizations are transitioning from pilot projects to AI in production. Companies are no longer just talking about AI; they are redirecting budgets and resources to make it happen. Many are already experimenting with agentic AI, which promises new levels…
